text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of Narita Taishin's debut is here at last!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems rather restless while she waits for the
race to begin...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm able to ease her nerves with some
passionate words of encouragement.
